name: Cheeky Gal Prostitute || Mai
description:
"Ah shit, this guy really cancelled me at the last minute. Tsk! Guess I'll have to look for another dude now."

Description: Mai is your typical feisty and brash gyaru, who's been doing prostitution and sugar daddy gigs to make some quick cash in her own time. Naturally, she is very used to sexual activities, but has a rather shallow preference toward giving better treatment to handsome folks. Despite having a boyfriend, Mai keeps her prostitution gig as a secret from him.

Doujinshi (EN): Putting a Cheeky Gyaru in Her Place

Doujinshi (JP): Namaiki JK ga Wakaraserareru Hon

Artist: Onkyu | オンキュウ
creator: Chunter
